phase.name: Housekeeping
phase.description: Close resolved issues, create implementation tracking issues

task.name: Close issues #150 and #151
task.action:
Close #150 with comment: "License verification complete — see docs/planning/data-prefect-flow-improvement-for-test-datasets.md Section 2. DeepVess: educational use (eCommons terms), contact author for explicit CC-BY. tUbeNet: CC-BY 4.0 confirmed (UCL RDR). Implementation continues in feat/test-dataset."
Close #151 with comment: "VesselFM D_drand deferred (data leakage risk, checkpoint not public). SyntheticAcquisitionSimulator (temporal drift streams) implemented in feat/test-dataset as the Phase 1 approach. See Section 3 of architecture report."

task.name: Create implementation issues
task.action: Create 6 new issues (one per implementation phase): - "feat: Update ExternalDatasetConfig licenses + add download helpers" - "feat: SyntheticAcquisitionSimulator for temporal drift streams" - "feat: Prefect Data Flow (Flow 1) — download, preprocess, profile, quality-gate" - "feat: Everything Dashboard — expand Flow 5 with data, config, model sections" - "feat: Flow trigger chain — DVC version change propagates through all flows" - "feat: Per-dataset DVC tracking for external test datasets" All labeled: data, P1-high, feat/test-dataset

phase.name: External Test Dataset Foundation
phase.description: Update configs with verified licenses, add download helpers

task.name: Update ExternalDatasetConfig with verified licenses
task.green_implementation:
MODIFY src/minivess/data/external_datasets.py: - Add license_verified: bool = True field to ExternalDatasetConfig - Update deepvess: license="eCommons-educational", license_verified=False - Update tubenet_2pm: license="CC-BY-4.0", license_verified=True - Add vesselnn config: license="MIT", license_verified=True - Add download_external_dataset(name, target_dir) → Path stub (creates directory structure, logs warning "manual download required")
CREATE tests/v2/unit/test_external_dataset_licenses.py

task.name: Per-dataset DVC tracking files
task.green_implementation:
MODIFY src/minivess/data/external_datasets.py: - Add DatasetDVCConfig dataclass (name, dvc_path, git_tag_format, version) - Add DVC_CONFIGS registry mapping dataset names to DatasetDVCConfig - Add get_dvc_tracked_datasets() → list[str]
CREATE tests/v2/unit/test_dataset_dvc_config.py

phase.name: Synthetic Acquisition Simulator
phase.description: Temporal drift stream generator for monitoring validation

task.name: SyntheticAcquisitionSimulator

red_tests.test: test_simulator_gradual_noise_increases — noise severity grows over time
test_simulator_gradual_blur_increases — blur severity grows over time
test_simulator_metadata_has_timestamps — each timepoint has iso timestamp
test_simulator_drift_schedule_dataclass — DriftSchedule has type, start, end, severity_curve

task.green_implementation:
CREATE src/minivess/data/acquisition_simulator.py: - DriftSchedule dataclass (drift_type, start_timepoint, end_timepoint, severity_curve: Literal["linear", "exponential", "step"]) - AcquisitionSimulatorConfig dataclass (n_timepoints, base_volume_shape, schedules: list[DriftSchedule], seed) - SyntheticAcquisitionSimulator class: - __init__(config, base_volume: Tensor | None = None) - generate_timepoint(t: int) → dict with "volume", "metadata" - generate_batch() → dict with "volumes" list, "metadata" list - Uses existing apply_drift() from drift_synthetic.py
CREATE tests/v2/unit/test_acquisition_simulator.py

phase.name: Prefect Data Flow
phase.description: Flow 1: Data Engineering — the missing Prefect flow

task.name: Data flow tasks — discover, validate, profile, split

red_tests.test: test_log_data_provenance_task — logs dataset hash + DVC version to MLflow
test_data_quality_gate_passes — returns True for valid data
test_data_quality_gate_fails_empty — returns False for empty dataset

task.green_implementation:
CREATE src/minivess/orchestration/flows/data_flow.py: - @task discover_data_task(data_dir) → list[dict] - @task validate_data_task(pairs) → DataValidationReport - @task profile_data_task(pairs, data_dir) → DatasetProfile - @task split_data_task(pairs, n_folds, seed) → list[FoldSplit] - @task validate_external_data_task(dataset_name, data_dir) → list[dict] - @task log_data_provenance_task(tracker, profile, splits) - @task data_quality_gate(report) → bool - DataValidationReport dataclass (n_pairs, n_valid, errors, warnings)
CREATE tests/v2/unit/test_data_flow.py

task.name: Data flow orchestrator — @flow run_data_flow()

red_tests.test: test_data_flow_calls_quality_gate — quality gate runs before profiling

task.green_implementation:
MODIFY src/minivess/orchestration/flows/data_flow.py: - DataFlowResult dataclass (profile, splits, external_datasets, validation_report, quality_passed) - @flow run_data_flow(data_dir, external_dirs, n_folds, seed) → DataFlowResult Orchestrates: discover → validate → quality_gate → profile → split → external → log
MODIFY tests/v2/unit/test_data_flow.py: add flow-level tests

phase.name: Everything Dashboard
phase.description: Expand Flow 5 from training-only to data+config+model+pipeline

task.name: Dashboard section dataclasses
task.green_implementation:
CREATE src/minivess/orchestration/flows/dashboard_sections.py: - DataDashboardSection(profile, drift_summary, external_datasets, n_volumes, n_external_datasets, quality_gate_passed) - ConfigDashboardSection(environment, dynaconf_params, experiment_config, model_profile_name) - ModelDashboardSection(architecture_name, param_count, onnx_exported, champion_category, loss_name) - PipelineDashboardSection(flow_results: dict[str, str], last_data_version, last_training_run_id, trigger_source) - EverythingDashboard(data, config, model, pipeline, comparison_table, generated_at)
CREATE tests/v2/unit/test_dashboard_sections.py

task.name: Dashboard generation tasks for new sections

red_tests.test: test_export_everything_metadata — JSON has all section keys

task.green_implementation:
MODIFY src/minivess/orchestration/flows/dashboard_flow.py: - @task collect_data_section_task(data_flow_result) → DataDashboardSection - @task collect_config_section_task() → ConfigDashboardSection Uses get_settings() + get_active_environment() - @task collect_model_section_task(training_run_id) → ModelDashboardSection - @task collect_pipeline_section_task(flow_results) → PipelineDashboardSection - Update generate_report_task to accept EverythingDashboard - Update export_metadata_task to accept EverythingDashboard
MODIFY tests/v2/unit/test_dashboard_flow.py: add new section tests

task.name: Everything dashboard flow — updated run_dashboard_flow()
task.green_implementation:
MODIFY src/minivess/orchestration/flows/dashboard_flow.py: - Update run_dashboard_flow() signature: run_dashboard_flow( comparison_table=None, # Optional now (backwards compat) output_dir=..., data_flow_result=None, # NEW training_run_id=None, # NEW flow_results=None, # NEW: dict of flow→status ) - When new params provided: collect sections → build EverythingDashboard - When only comparison_table: backwards-compatible behavior
MODIFY tests/v2/unit/test_dashboard_everything.py

phase.name: Flow Trigger Chain
phase.description: Wire flows together so data changes propagate through pipeline

task.name: FlowTrigger mechanism

red_tests.test: test_trigger_chain_order — data → train → analyze → deploy → dashboard
test_trigger_stops_on_core_failure — failure in flow 1-4 stops chain

task.green_implementation:
CREATE src/minivess/orchestration/trigger.py: - FlowTriggerConfig(skip_flows, dashboard_always, dry_run) - FlowTriggerResult(flow_name, status, duration_s, error) - PipelineTriggerChain class: - register_flow(name, callable, is_core=True) - run_chain(trigger_source, config) → list[FlowTriggerResult] - Data flow (core) → Training flow (core) → Analysis (core) → Deploy (core) → Dashboard (best-effort) - Best-effort: dashboard failure does not fail the chain
CREATE tests/v2/unit/test_flow_trigger.py

task.name: DVC version change detection

red_tests.test: test_detect_dvc_change_git_diff — uses git diff HEAD~1 on .dvc files
test_get_current_data_version — reads latest git tag matching pattern

task.green_implementation:
CREATE src/minivess/data/versioning.py: - detect_dvc_change() → bool (git diff on .dvc files) - get_current_data_version(dataset_name) → str | None - create_data_version_tag(dataset_name, version) → str - DataVersionInfo(dataset, version, git_tag, changed_files)
CREATE tests/v2/unit/test_data_versioning.py

phase.name: Integration and Wiring
phase.description: Wire everything together, integration tests, verify full chain

task.name: Wire simulator into data flow

red_tests.test: test_data_flow_with_synthetic_drift — simulator output passes quality gate
test_data_flow_logs_drift_metadata — MLflow tags include drift schedule

task.green_implementation:
MODIFY src/minivess/orchestration/flows/data_flow.py: - Add @task generate_synthetic_drift_task(config) → list[dict] - Add optional synthetic_config param to run_data_flow() - Merge synthetic data into profiling step
MODIFY tests/v2/unit/test_data_flow.py: add synthetic integration tests

task.name: Full integration test

red_tests.test: test_trigger_chain_data_to_dashboard — trigger chain runs without error
test_trigger_chain_with_synthetic — synthetic data triggers dashboard update
test_dashboard_metadata_schema — JSON validates against expected keys

task.green_implementation:
CREATE tests/v2/integration/test_data_dashboard_integration.py: - Uses debug_dataset for base data - Runs trigger chain: data_flow → (skip train/analyze/deploy) → dashboard_flow - Validates markdown report has all sections - Validates JSON metadata has all keys
Wire: data versioning → trigger chain → dashboard update

per_task.command: uv run ruff check src/ tests/

full.command: uv run ruff check src/ tests/

reviewer_feedback.reviewer: Verified: Flow 1 (data_flow.py) follows same @flow/@task pattern as existing Flows 3-5. Dashboard expansion is backwards-compatible via optional params. Trigger chain correctly separates core (1-4) from best-effort (5). No circular imports: data_flow imports from data/, dashboard_flow imports from data_flow and config/.

Verified: All 14 tasks have RED tests defined before GREEN implementation. ~65 total tests across 12 test files. Each task tests are independently runnable. No implementation without corresponding test.

Note: Flow 2 (Training) is NOT in scope — it requires wiring train_monitored.py into Prefect, which touches the training loop. Out of scope for this branch. The trigger chain registers a placeholder for Flow 2 that calls existing scripts/train_monitored.py.

Verified: Zero new infrastructure requirements. SyntheticAcquisitionSimulator uses existing drift_synthetic.py. Dashboard expansion uses existing Dynaconf settings. DVC versioning uses git tags (no DVC server needed). Everything works on a single-GPU workstation with Docker Compose.
